summary: Frontend-only verification of the Top-5 safety-aware sort + chips + tap-handler + Show more/less changes in (tabs)/implant-selection.tsx (ChooseResult & SuggestResult) and components/CaseImplantPlanning.tsx. Confirmed via static code review that the 3 diffs requested by the main agent are correctly in place. Performed live E2E up to the implant-selection page (login, tab navigation, tooth-36 selection, dropdown opens with 50 systems listed) but was unable to drive the React-Native-Web Modal-based system picker through Playwright to fully reach the result list. No regressions observed in console/network during the partial walk-through.

design_issues.screen: Implant Selection — Select Implant System modal
issues: Modal/portal renders below the page content (offscreen on tall viewports). On a 1280x2400 desktop viewport the picker is at the absolute bottom and reads 'Element is outside of the viewport' for Playwright. Real users on phone-sized screens hit a normal bottom-sheet so this is purely a desktop-web ergonomics nit, not a functional defect.

action_items: No code changes required. Main agent diffs are correct.

Optional: when running on web the system-picker Modal could constrain its height to viewport (maxHeight: '80vh') so it isn't pushed offscreen — would also unblock automated E2E click-through for the result list.
critical_code_review_comments: (tabs)/implant-selection.tsx L595-602 — annotateImplantSafety + _safetyRank sort correctly pushes length_block to the bottom (-Infinity), ranks width_warning by marginMm ascending, and lets ok rows float to the top (Infinity). slice(0,5) + Show More/Less wiring at L639-640, L772-783 is consistent with the request.

(tabs)/implant-selection.tsx L607-637 ChooseResult handleImplantTap — length_block triggers a blocking Alert (no setSelectedIdx), width_warning triggers a 2-button Alert with the audit POST guarded inside Continue-with-selection's onPress; correct context 'implant_selection_home', correct payload fields (tooth_position, bone_width, bone_height, implant_diameter, implant_length, margin_mm, system).

(tabs)/implant-selection.tsx L1007-1051 SuggestResult — annotatedSystems wraps every system's implants; handleSuggestTap is wired into TouchableOpacity at L1174 (previously bypassed via setSelectedKey direct call); chip rendering at L1180-1186 is gated on chip != null; audit context 'implant_selection_home_suggest' matches backend convention. ✅

components/CaseImplantPlanning.tsx L1587-1602 — IIFE now sorts via _safetyRank before slicing top-5; header at L1625 reads 'Top {min(5,N)} Best Matches' (was 'Top 3'); tap handler at L1639-1668 mirrors the Home tab and posts to /audit/safety-override under context 'phase1_step2'. ✅

Minor robustness suggestion (non-blocking): in CaseImplantPlanning the tap-handler closes around `apply` which is defined inside the map iteration — that's fine, but the same `evaluateImplantSafety` is re-invoked twice per row (once in the sort, once in the row render). For 5–20 rows this is negligible, but if the map ever grows you could memoize the verdict on each item like SuggestResult does with annotateImplantSafety.

Tested data-testid coverage is good: recommended-implant-{i}, safety-chip-{i}, show-more-btn / show-less-btn (Choose); suggest-implant-{i}-{j}, suggest-safety-chip-{i}-{j}, suggest-show-more-btn / suggest-show-less-btn (Suggest); result-implant-{i}, show-more-implants (Phase 1 Step 2). Future automated tests can target these directly.

success_rate.frontend: code-review 100% pass; live click-through partial (login + navigation + page render verified, system-picker modal selection not driven through Playwright due to RNW portal/offscreen quirk)

test_credentials: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md — Gaurav.pandey/Student@123 logged in successfully and reached /implant-selection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 3 code changes from this session are visible and correct in source: (1) (tabs)/implant-selection.tsx ChooseResult had safety sort + Top 5 + Show more + chips already; this iteration only re-verified. (2) Same file SuggestResult was wired in this session — handleSuggestTap is now the onPress for the size badge at L1174 and chip rendering at L1180 reads imp._safety from annotatedSystems. (3) CaseImplantPlanning.tsx L1587-1700 now sorts before slice(0,5) and shows 'Top 5 Best Matches'. The only blocker on live UI E2E was the RNW Modal picker rendering offscreen — same picker is used in many other tabs (CaseImplantPlanning's own system selector inside the modal does not have this problem because the page itself scrolls). If you want to fully drive the flow, either tap directly into REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api/implant-library/suggest with a known payload, or override the picker's <Modal> with a regular touchable list during test mode. Backend safety-override audit endpoint and admin access-logs viewer both passed in iter_109/iter_110 — no need to retest.
rca_of_the_issue: No bug. The requested feature set is implemented and visible in source. Live UI walkthrough was partially completed; the system-picker Modal in React-Native-Web positions its bottom-sheet below the page content on a fixed-pixel viewport, which Playwright reports as 'outside of the viewport' for clicks on the brand list. This is a test-tooling friction point, not a product defect — real mobile/PWA users see the sheet rise from the bottom normally.
